description: Landing page moderna para startups y productos tech

grapesjs.html:
LaunchPad
FeaturesHow It WorksTestimonialsPricingGet Started
New: AI-Powered Analytics

Build Products
Users Love

The all-in-one platform to launch, grow, and scale your startup. From idea to IPO, we've got you covered with powerful tools and insights.

Start Free TrialWatch Demo
10K+Active Users
99.9%Uptime
4.9/5Rating

Everything You Need to Succeed

Powerful features designed for modern teams and ambitious startups.

⚡

Lightning Fast

Optimized performance with sub-second load times. Your users will never wait.

🛡

Enterprise Security

Bank-grade encryption, SOC2 compliance, and advanced threat protection built-in.

📊

Smart Analytics

AI-powered insights to understand your users and make data-driven decisions.

🔄

Auto Scaling

From 10 to 10 million users, our infrastructure scales automatically.

🔗

Integrations

Connect with 200+ tools including Slack, GitHub, Jira, and more.

🎯

A/B Testing

Test variations, measure impact, and ship with confidence every time.

How It Works

Get started in three simple steps. No credit card required.

01

Create Your Account

Sign up in seconds with your email or Google account. Set up your workspace and invite your team.

02

Configure Your Project

Choose from pre-built templates or start from scratch. Connect your data sources and tools.

03

Launch & Grow

Deploy to production with one click. Monitor performance and iterate based on real user data.

Loved by Founders

See what leaders in the industry say about our platform.

★★★★★

"LaunchPad transformed how we build products. We shipped 3x faster and our users noticed the quality improvement immediately."

Sarah Chen
CEO, TechFlow
★★★★★

"The analytics alone are worth the price. We finally understand our users and can make decisions backed by real data."

Marcus Rodriguez
CTO, DataBridge
★★★★★

"From MVP to Series A, LaunchPad has been our secret weapon. The integrations save us hours every single week."

Elena Vasquez
Founder, GrowthLab

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. No surprises. Cancel anytime.

Starter

Perfect for side projects and MVPs

$0/month
  • Up to 3 projects
  • 1,000 monthly events
  • Basic analytics
  • Community support
  • 1 team member
Get Started Free
Most Popular

Pro

For growing startups and teams

$49/month
  • Unlimited projects
  • 100,000 monthly events
  • Advanced analytics & AI
  • Priority support
  • Up to 10 team members
  • Custom integrations
Start Free Trial

Enterprise

For large teams with custom needs

Custom
  • Everything in Pro
  • Unlimited events
  • Dedicated account manager
  • 24/7 phone support
  • Unlimited team members
  • SLA & custom contracts
Contact Sales

Join 10,000+ startups already using LaunchPad to ship products faster.

grapesjs.css: .startup-nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding:0 24px;}.startup-nav-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:64px;}.startup-logo{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#6366f1;text-decoration:none;}.startup-nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:28px;}.startup-nav-links a{font-size:14px;color:#475569;text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;transition:color 0.2s;}.startup-nav-links a:hover{color:#6366f1;}.startup-nav-cta{background:#6366f1!important;color:#fff!important;padding:8px 20px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600!important;transition:background 0.2s!important;}.startup-nav-cta:hover{background:#4f46e5!important;}.startup-hero{padding:140px 24px 80px;text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f8faff 0%,#eef2ff 50%,#fff 100%);}.startup-hero-inner{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;}.startup-hero-badge{display:inline-block;padding:6px 16px;background:#eef2ff;border:1px solid #c7d2fe;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;color:#6366f1;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:24px;}.startup-hero-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:64px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;color:#1e293b;margin-bottom:24px;}.startup-hero-gradient{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1 0%,#0ea5e9 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;}.startup-hero-subtitle{font-size:20px;line-height:1.6;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:36px;max-width:600px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}.startup-hero-buttons{display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:48px;flex-wrap:wrap;}.startup-btn-primary{display:inline-block;padding:14px 32px;background:#6366f1;color:#fff;border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:16px;transition:all 0.2s;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(99,102,241,0.4);}.startup-btn-primary:hover{background:#4f46e5;transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(99,102,241,0.5);}.startup-btn-secondary{display:inline-block;padding:14px 32px;background:#fff;color:#1e293b;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:16px;transition:all 0.2s;}.startup-btn-secondary:hover{border-color:#6366f1;color:#6366f1;}.startup-btn-secondary-light{display:inline-block;padding:14px 32px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:16px;transition:all 0.2s;}.startup-btn-secondary-light:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}.startup-hero-stats{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:48px;}.startup-stat{text-align:center;}.startup-stat-number{display:block;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;color:#1e293b;}.startup-stat-label{font-size:14px;color:#94a3b8;}.startup-container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;}.startup-section-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:56px;}.startup-section-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:40px;font-weight:700;color:#1e293b;margin-bottom:16px;}.startup-section-subtitle{font-size:18px;color:#64748b;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto;}.startup-features{padding:100px 0;background:#fff;}.startup-features-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}.startup-feature-card{padding:32px;border-radius:16px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #f1f5f9;transition:all 0.3s;}.startup-feature-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);border-color:#e2e8f0;}.startup-feature-icon{font-size:36px;margin-bottom:16px;}.startup-feature-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:#1e293b;margin-bottom:8px;}.startup-feature-desc{font-size:15px;color:#64748b;line-height:1.6;}.startup-how-it-works{padding:100px 0;background:#f8fafc;}.startup-steps{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;gap:0;}.startup-step{flex:1;text-align:center;padding:0 24px;max-width:320px;}.startup-step-number{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:48px;font-weight:700;color:#c7d2fe;margin-bottom:16px;}.startup-step-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:600;color:#1e293b;margin-bottom:12px;}.startup-step-desc{font-size:15px;color:#64748b;line-height:1.6;}.startup-step-connector{width:60px;height:2px;background:#e2e8f0;margin-top:36px;flex-shrink:0;}.startup-testimonials{padding:100px 0;background:#fff;}.startup-testimonials-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;}.startup-testimonial-card{background:#f8fafc;border-radius:16px;padding:32px;border:1px solid #f1f5f9;transition:all 0.3s;}.startup-testimonial-card:hover{box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);}.startup-testimonial-stars{color:#f59e0b;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:16px;letter-spacing:2px;}.startup-testimonial-text{font-size:15px;color:#475569;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:24px;font-style:italic;}.startup-testimonial-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;}.startup-testimonial-avatar{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;}.startup-testimonial-name{font-weight:600;color:#1e293b;font-size:15px;}.startup-testimonial-role{font-size:13px;color:#94a3b8;}.startup-pricing{padding:100px 0;background:#f8fafc;}.startup-pricing-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;align-items:start;}.startup-pricing-card{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:36px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;text-align:center;transition:all 0.3s;position:relative;}.startup-pricing-card:hover{box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);}.startup-pricing-featured{border:2px solid #6366f1;transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(99,102,241,0.15);}.startup-pricing-badge{position:absolute;top:-14px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#6366f1;color:#fff;padding:4px 20px;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;}.startup-pricing-name{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:#1e293b;margin-bottom:8px;}.startup-pricing-desc{font-size:14px;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:24px;}.startup-pricing-price{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:52px;font-weight:700;color:#1e293b;margin-bottom:24px;}.startup-pricing-period{font-size:16px;font-weight:400;color:#94a3b8;}.startup-pricing-features{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0 0 32px;text-align:left;}.startup-pricing-features li{padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f5f9;font-size:15px;color:#475569;padding-left:24px;position:relative;}.startup-pricing-features li::before{content:'\2713';position:absolute;left:0;color:#6366f1;font-weight:700;}.startup-pricing-btn{display:block;padding:14px;border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:15px;transition:all 0.2s;text-align:center;}.startup-pricing-btn-outline{border:2px solid #6366f1;color:#6366f1;background:transparent;}.startup-pricing-btn-outline:hover{background:#6366f1;color:#fff;}.startup-pricing-btn-filled{background:#6366f1;color:#fff;border:2px solid #6366f1;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(99,102,241,0.4);}.startup-pricing-btn-filled:hover{background:#4f46e5;border-color:#4f46e5;}.startup-cta-final{padding:100px 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1 0%,#0ea5e9 100%);}.startup-cta-inner{text-align:center;}.startup-cta-title{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:44px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:16px;}.startup-cta-subtitle{font-size:20px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);margin-bottom:36px;}.startup-footer{padding:64px 0 32px;background:#0f172a;color:#94a3b8;}.startup-footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:48px;margin-bottom:48px;}.startup-footer-logo{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:12px;}.startup-footer-tagline{font-size:15px;color:#64748b;}.startup-footer-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}.startup-footer-heading{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em;margin-bottom:4px;}.startup-footer-col a{font-size:14px;color:#94a3b8;text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.2s;}.startup-footer-col a:hover{color:#fff;}.startup-footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid #1e293b;padding-top:24px;text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:#475569;}@media(max-width:768px){.startup-hero-title{font-size:40px;}.startup-features-grid,.startup-testimonials-grid,.startup-pricing-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.startup-steps{flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}.startup-step-connector{width:2px;height:40px;}.startup-pricing-featured{transform:scale(1);}.startup-footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;}.startup-hero-stats{flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}.startup-nav-links{display:none;}}
